_meta.purpose: Labeled task->category set for measuring resolve_category accuracy. Tasks are natural developer phrasings; some deliberately omit the exact keyword, so the number reflects real-world resolution rather than a tautology. Run `python eval_resolution.py`.
_meta.resolution: task-only (no explicit role/category); the keyword-substring heuristic
_meta.note: Resolution is parity-identical across the Python and JS ports (parity_check.sh), so one runner measures both.
